items.title: Your Authentic Carhartt Apparel
items.meta: Information about your Carhartt K87 can be found below

fields.care: Machine wash warm with like colors. Non-Chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry medium, remove promptly

items.title: Your Authentic Carhartt Apparel
items.meta: Information about your Carhartt 100615 can be found below

fields.care: Machine wash cold gentle cycle with mild detergent. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low remove promptly. Do not iron. Do not dry clean.
